name: CPA Tax Review
_comment: Track H migration: was Webhook -> GPT-4o -> Format -> Slack (4 nodes, hardcoded model). Now Webhook -> Brain (persona_pin=cpa). PersonaSpec routes CPA to Sonnet with escalation, Brain posts directly to #engineering, cost flows through the unified CostTracker.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ organization_id: 'paperwork-labs', message: $json.body.message || 'Run CPA tax review on latest filings and flag any Circular 230 issues.', user_id: $json.body.user_id || 'n8n-cpa-tax-review', channel: 'n8n', request_id: ($workflow.id + '-' + Date.now()), persona_pin: 'cpa', slack_channel_id: 'C0AM01NHQ3Y', slack_username: 'CPA Advisor', slack_icon_emoji: ':nerd_face:' }) }}
